official_functions.role: Construct the official Login clientbound hello packet fixture
Write the official Login clientbound hello body
Write the full Login clientbound framed hello packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login clientbound framed hello packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login clientbound state

official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundHelloPacket.getServerId(), getChallenge(), shouldAuthenticate(), private publicKey field, ClientLoginPacketListener.handleHello(ClientboundHelloPacket)
official_functions.role: Read the decoded Login hello fields from the official packet instance and confirm the Login listener clientbound surface

invariants: The official Login clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the hello body.
The official Login clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundHelloPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundHelloPacket preserves serverId, publicKey, challenge, and shouldAuthenticate from the fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, Login clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove encryption success, authentication success, key validation, login state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer encryption success, authentication success, key validation, login state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
